name: RAND CAPITAL CORP
summary: Rand Capital Corporation is an externally managed, closed-end, non-diversified business development company (BDC) regulated under the 1940 Act. Managed by Rand Capital Management, LLC (RCM), Rand invests primarily in higher-yielding debt instruments and equity securities of privately held, lower middle market companies with revenues greater than $10 million and EBITDA exceeding $1.5 million, providing growth capital, expansion capital, and ownership transition financing across a broad variety of industries.

products.name: Debt Investments
products.description: Higher-yielding debt instruments provided to lower middle market private companies for growth, expansion, or ownership transition.

products.name: Equity Investments
products.description: Minority equity and warrant positions taken alongside debt investments in portfolio companies.

products.name: Co-Investment Program
products.description: SEC-exemptive-relief-backed co-investment program allowing Rand to invest alongside RCM affiliates on same terms.

partnerships.description: External investment adviser and administrator managing Rand's investment activities under the Investment Management Agreement and Administration Agreement.
Majority shareholder owning approximately 64% of Rand's common stock; invested $25 million in 2019 in exchange for ~8.3 million shares.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
